name: South Japantown Home
description: On top of the shutdown Hotel, lies V’s Beautiful Escape from the Night City Streets, YOUR NEW SOUTH JAPANTOWN HOME ! Your New 2 Story Home features a Stunning Interior and Upstairs Bedroom. Outside you’ll find the AV Landing Pad and also a Ladder taking you to the Roof/ 3rd and 4th Floor Viewing spaces ! You can now even go on the NCART Tracks !
